metadata.description: المرجع الأعلى لتنفيذ DSH/WLT slices. يجمع ويصنّف كل مدخلات التحليل. لا يجوز بدء تنفيذ أي شريحة قبل وجود هذا الملف صالحًا.

scope.webapp_website_rule: Only if directly required to close a DSH slice — otherwise excluded
scope.description: DSH is the primary implementation target. WLT is a financial boundary dependency.

source_files.description: Input files that informed this master reference. Do not implement from these directly — consult this file.

donor_inputs.summary: Donor analysis completed 2026-06-21. Key findings below.

donor_git.head: e5080831
donor_git.last_commit: Remove fake runtime actor id fallbacks

dsh.backend: dsh/backend/ — Go service with handlers, postgres repos, migrations (32 total), seeds
dsh.frontend: dsh/frontend/ — screens per surface + shared boundary modules

wlt.backend: wlt/backend/ — Go service with handlers, postgres repos, migrations (7 total)
wlt.frontend: wlt/frontend/ — WLT bridge components per DSH surface

donor_structure.ui_kit: ui-kit/ — single design system, clean, no local bypasses found

cors_wildcard.detail: 14 DSH handler files + WLT main.go use Access-Control-Allow-Origin: *
cors_wildcard.action: Replace with explicit origin list before adopting

old_ports_as_host.status: PARTIAL — docker host ports differ but internal ports conflict
old_ports_as_host.detail: DSH internal: 8080, WLT internal: 8083. Host ports: 18082/18083 (not target spec). wlt-dsh-client.ts hardcodes http://localhost:8083
old_ports_as_host.action: Remap to 58080 (DSH) and new WLT port. Fix hardcoded URL in wlt-dsh-client.ts

memory_repositories.detail: DSH memory repo: NOT thread-safe. WLT memory repo: thread-safe (RWMutex) but uses math/rand. Both activate when DATABASE_URL absent.
memory_repositories.action: REJECT_RUNTIME_RISK — ensure DATABASE_URL always set. Never deploy without it.

fake_actor_ids.detail: HEAD commit: 'Remove fake runtime actor id fallbacks'. Zero fake IDs found.

financial_mutations_in_dsh.detail: DSH stores only bridge reference IDs (wlt_payment_ref_id, wlt_refund_ref_id). Migration 025 explicitly dropped refund_amount and settlement_amount columns. dsh-wlt-boundary.ts declares mutation: forbidden.

direct_fetch_in_screens.detail: No fetch() in screen files. All API calls through typed clients.

tamagui_outside_ui_kit.detail: No direct Tamagui imports in DSH/WLT frontend. All go through @bthwani/ui-kit.

mock_demo_data.detail: Runtime violations marked RUNTIME_VIOLATION_FIXED (deleted 2026-06-12/13). dev-fixtures-isolation-guard.ts enforces remaining DEV_ALLOWED items.
mock_demo_data.action: Monitor — do not lift DEV_ALLOWED items to production

http_timeouts.detail: DSH auth middleware: 5s timeout. WLT: 5s auth + 10s payment/refund handlers.

normalization_required_before_adoption: Replace CORS wildcard in all 14 DSH handlers and WLT main.go
Remap Docker ports: DSH internal 8080 → host 58080; WLT internal 8083 → new WLT port
Remove captain finance screen Arabic 'preview فقط' label (DshCaptainFinanceScreen.tsx)
Auth service in dsh/backend/cmd/auth-service/ — reference only, belongs in core/identity

ports.exception: Port 8080 as container_port inside compose.runtime.yml only, mapped to host 58080. Never as host port.

slices_done: DSH-001 code complete on app-client + control-panel + app-partner + app-field + app-captain; visual closure pending

wlt.activation_condition: WLT-FOUNDATION slice gates PASS + WLT implementation slice approved

app_client.start_command: $env:EXPO_PUBLIC_DSH_API_BASE_URL='http://127.0.0.1:58080'; pnpm --dir apps/app-client/runtime exec expo start --dev-client --host localhost --port 18101 --android --clear

app_partner.start_command: $env:EXPO_PUBLIC_DSH_API_BASE_URL='http://127.0.0.1:58080'; pnpm --dir apps/app-partner/runtime exec expo start --dev-client --host localhost --port 18102 --android --clear

app_captain.start_command: $env:EXPO_PUBLIC_DSH_API_BASE_URL='http://127.0.0.1:58080'; pnpm --dir apps/app-captain/runtime exec expo start --dev-client --host localhost --port 18103 --android --clear

app_field.start_command: $env:EXPO_PUBLIC_DSH_API_BASE_URL='http://127.0.0.1:58080'; pnpm --dir apps/app-field/runtime exec expo start --dev-client --host localhost --port 18104 --android --clear

control_panel.current_state: EMPTY — src/ is empty, only .gitkeep and .next artifacts
control_panel.priority: HIGHEST — control-panel closes the full-stack loop for every DSH slice

dsh_wlt_boundary.principle: WLT is the sole owner of financial truth. DSH is the operational layer.

DSH-001.name: Store Discovery + Store Detail
DSH-001.priority: CLOSED — do not start another slice without approval

control_panel_requirements.priority: CRITICAL — empty in target. Must be built alongside each DSH slice.
control_panel_requirements.filters_required: status, date, owner, search, cursor + section-specific filters
control_panel_requirements.donor_alias_mapping: See donor_control_panel_alias_matrix.csv for donor screen → target screen mapping

mobile_ux_requirements.journey_pattern: canonical navigation → loading/permission gate → authoritative data → primary action → success/empty/blocked/retry state
mobile_ux_requirements.offline_rule: bounded retry with no fabricated live data or duplicate write
mobile_ux_requirements.evidence_required: route, permission, all declared states, RTL screenshot, small-screen screenshot

key_journeys.JRN-001: app-client: Store Discovery → browse stores → DSH-001
key_journeys.JRN-002: app-client: Store Detail → select store → DSH-001
key_journeys.JRN-003: app-client: Storefront Catalog → browse products → DSH-003
key_journeys.JRN-004: app-client: Product Details → add to cart → DSH-003/DSH-004
key_journeys.partner_journeys: app-partner: catalog management, order queue, readiness — DSH-003, DSH-006, DSH-008
key_journeys.captain_journeys: app-captain: order assignment, pickup, delivery — DSH-007
key_journeys.field_journeys: app-field: store onboarding, readiness, documents — DSH-008

screen_state_requirements.loading_rule: preserves table or workspace geometry while loading authorized data
screen_state_requirements.empty_rule: explains zero-result condition and offers only valid filter reset or owning workflow action
screen_state_requirements.error_rule: distinguishes validation, dependency, authorization, and server failures — displays correlation reference
screen_state_requirements.permission_rule: hides sensitive fields and actions — does not reveal whether an inaccessible object exists
screen_state_requirements.offline_rule: shows unavailable or explicitly stale read state — never substitutes donor or preview data
screen_state_requirements.retry_rule: retries bounded reads — writes require confirmation, retained idempotency key, and stale-version protection
screen_state_requirements.success_rule: renders the authoritative service read model and audited outcome
screen_state_requirements.blocked_rule: names the missing contract, permission, dependency, or business rule without claiming completion

key_rules.store_visibility: expose only stores passing active, publication, visibility, and serviceability policy
key_rules.financial_isolation: DSH may retain opaque financial references and read-only statuses only — mutation forbidden
key_rules.idempotency: writes require idempotency key — see per-operation requirement in logic matrix
key_rules.auth_per_operation: authenticated client + role + function permission + tenant + store + assignment + object ownership
key_rules.error_taxonomy: invalid filter, not found, hidden by policy, unavailable zone, identity dependency unavailable, repo timeout
key_rules.negative_cases: cross-tenant ID, non-owner object, wrong role, unassigned actor, duplicate request, replayed event, malformed ID, oversized payload
key_rules.performance: cursor or bounded offset pagination, indexed filters, deterministic ordering, max page size 100, p95 latency evidence
key_rules.observability: structured outcome log, trace span, latency/error/retry metrics, correlationId, actor scope, aggregate ID — no secrets

extraction_decisions.description: Classified donor items. Full detail in dsh_wlt_extraction_matrix.csv

examples: wlt/frontend/dsh/ (all bridge components) — clean typed clients
ui-kit/ — single design system, no bypasses
dsh/backend/internal/http/*.go (14 handler files) — correct logic, CORS wildcard
wlt/backend/cmd/wlt-api/main.go — CORS wildcard at server level
critical_normalizations: CORS: Replace Access-Control-Allow-Origin: * with explicit origins in all 14 DSH handlers
CORS: Fix WLT main.go corsHandler wildcard
PORTS: Remap all Docker compose internal ports to target spec

REJECT_RUNTIME_RISK.rule: NEVER deploy without DATABASE_URL set to Postgres. Memory repos are dev fallbacks only.

REJECT_FINANCE_BOUNDARY_VIOLATION.note: Donor financial boundary is clean. Migration 025 removed financial amount columns from DSH. dsh-wlt-boundary.ts enforces mutation: forbidden.

examples: donor checkout screens — visual reference for DSH-005 only

pre_slice_gates: NO_OLD_PORTS_GATE — no ports 8080-8084/3000 as host ports

per_slice.api_smoke: Invoke-RestMethod returns HTTP 200 with real data
per_slice.docker: pnpm runtime:status shows all services UP

required_files_per_slice: screenshot (at least one per affected surface)

current.DSH-001-control-panel: PRESENT — success, detail, and error screenshots

blocking_rules.no_slice_start_without_pre_gates: All pre_slice_gates must PASS before any implementation begins
blocking_rules.no_closed_without_evidence: No slice may be declared CLOSED/RUNTIME_VERIFIED without live runtime evidence
blocking_rules.no_wlt_activation_without_slice: WLT must not activate until WLT-FOUNDATION slice gates PASS
blocking_rules.no_financial_mutation_in_dsh: guard:no-financial-mutation-outside-wlt must return 0 violations at all times
blocking_rules.no_old_ports: Host ports 8080-8084/3000 are forbidden. Exception: container port 8080 mapped to host 58080.
blocking_rules.no_memory_repo_in_production: DATABASE_URL must always be set. Memory repos are dev-only fallbacks.
blocking_rules.no_direct_fetch_in_screens: All API calls must go through typed clients generated from OpenAPI
blocking_rules.no_tamagui_outside_ui_kit: All UI components must use shared/ui-kit exports
blocking_rules.no_cors_wildcard_non_local: CORS wildcard * is forbidden in non-local deployments
blocking_rules.control_panel_required_per_slice: Every DSH slice must have a corresponding control-panel surface to close the full-stack loop

execution_rules.sequence: DSH-001 is closed. Stop; DSH-002 control-panel and DSH-003 require separate approval.
execution_rules.donor_adoption_rule: For each donor file: check extraction_decisions in this file. If ADAPT_NORMALIZE, apply normalizations first. If REJECT_*, do not use.
execution_rules.contract_first: Expand dsh.openapi.yaml before implementing any new DSH-003+ handlers
execution_rules.client_regenerate: Regenerate typed client after every contract change before frontend work
execution_rules.evidence_before_next: Complete all evidence for current slice before starting next slice
execution_rules.control_panel_always_paired: Never close a DSH slice as complete unless control-panel surface is also done
execution_rules.wlt_placeholder_honesty: WLT placeholder must not return fake PASS. It is CONTRACT_ONLY.
execution_rules.no_100_without_evidence: NEVER declare DSH 100% or CLOSED without complete runtime + visual evidence for all slices and all surfaces
